commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I will make Pathros desolate, and will set fire in Zoan, and will execute judgments in No. Taphnis, or Tanis, famous for the miracles of Moses. (Calmet) Alexandria. In the Hebrew No, which was the ancient name of that city, which was afterwards rebuilt by Alexander the Great, and from his name called Alexandria. (Challoner) Septuagint, "Memphis or Diospolis "(Calmet) or Thebes, capital of Higher Egypt; (Bo chart) though it seems rather a maritime town, Nahum iii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
